subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He in Whose grasp lieth the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and verily He doth encompass all things and sendeth down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی فی قبضته ملکوت ملک السموات و الارض و انه کان بکلشیء محیطا و ینزل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
